reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(7)(ii)(C) requires an emergency mode operation plan, which in the context of Kubernetes translates to ensuring that critical components like etcd have backups configured, the API server is set up for high availability, and there is a documented disaster recovery plan for the cluster. Additionally, enabling node auto-repair can help maintain cluster operations during emergencies.
title: 164_308_a_7_ii_c: 164.308(a)(7)(ii)(C) Emergency mode operation plan
